case_title: OLIVE GROVE CAPITAL, LP VS. EVERETT PETER LYNN ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLIVE GROVE CAPITAL, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNN, EVERETT PETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3155 BRODERICK STREET, UNIT NUMBER 105, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVE GROVE CAPITAL, LP AS TO DEFENDANT LYNN, EVERETT PETER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
